product.name: ArAstar
descriptions: ArAstar, 100% Polyester taffeta fabric for garment lining.
It can be used as a lining inside of the shoes.
ArAstar is the most economical woven fabric on the market as textile material.
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp > 500N ; Weft > 400N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp > 20N ; Weft > 15N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

modelOutput.noMatchReason: ArAstar is a generic 100% polyester lining fabric for garments and shoe linings, with no explicit sector application (military, medical, sport, transport, etc.) stated in the product data.

normalized.noMatchReason: ArAstar is a generic 100% polyester lining fabric for garments and shoe linings, with no explicit sector application (military, medical, sport, transport, etc.) stated in the product data.
